fields.name: Source No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the source document that the entry originates from.

fields.name: Source Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the source document that the entry originates from.

fields.name: Source Document
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document that the line relates to.

fields.name: Shelf No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shelf number of the item for information use.

fields.name: From Zone Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the zone from which the items should be taken.

fields.name: From Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the bin from which the items should be taken.

fields.name: To Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the bin into which the items should be placed.

fields.name: To Zone Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the zone in which the items should be placed.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item that the line concerns.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item you want to move.

fields.name: Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that should be handled in the base unit of measure.

fields.name: Qty. Outstanding
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that still needs to be handled.

fields.name: Qty. Outstanding (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that still needs to be handled, expressed in the base unit of measure.

fields.name: Qty. to Handle
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item you want to move.

fields.name: Qty. to Handle (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity you want to handle, in the base unit of measure.

fields.name: Qty. Handled
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that has been handled and registered.

fields.name: Qty. Handled (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that has been handled and registered, in the base unit of measure.

fields.name: Qty. per From Unit of Measure
Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the item on the line.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies information in addition to the description.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the due date of the line.

fields.name: Destination Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of destination associated with the warehouse worksheet line.

fields.name: Destination No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer, vendor, or location for which the items should be processed.

fields.name: Shipping Advice
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shipping advice on the warehouse shipment line associated with this worksheet line.

fields.name: Whse. Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of warehouse document this line is associated with.

fields.name: Whse. Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the warehouse document.

fields.name: Whse. Document Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the line in the warehouse document that is the basis for the worksheet line.
